title: The Blood Moon (Optifine)
description: On a full moon, the moon turns red; Near midnight, the sky turns red. (this is highly experimental so feel free to make a better one and share it)
body: The pack should make it so that on a full moon, the moon turns red; Near midnight, the sky turns red. Yes this was inspired by BotW and TotK. requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) This pack is highly experimental so no guarantees that it will work as intended. Ok, so I admit this isn't my best work. For starters the moon isn't centered, and all the vanilla Minecraft stars disappeared. But this texture pack is less of a final product and more of a template. So feel free to make a better one! I have tested this multiple times and it has worked 7 times out of 10. If you do manage to make a better pack out of this, let me know. I'd love to see it!
